guide_title: The Only All-You-Can-Eat Pizza Huts in Australia
manual_intro:
Australia's all-you-can-eat Pizza Hut dine-in buffets are now rare: only eight locations remain across NSW, QLD, VIC and TAS. Expect a nostalgic buffet mix of pizza, pasta, garlic bread, salad and dessert, with fresh pizzas cycling from the oven and favourites often available on request.

Prices and sessions can change by store, so check before you travel. Current brief pricing: weekdays $18.95 lunch / $24.95 dinner; weekends $23.95 lunch / $24.95 dinner.
place_description: One of Sydney's last nostalgic dine-in Pizza Hut buffet restaurants, close to St Andrews and Minto. Address: 1 Swettenham Rd, Minto NSW 2566.
